title: Web Socket
subtitle: WebSocket Vulnerabilities: WebSocket is a communication protocol that enables full-duplex communication between a client and a server over a single, long-lived connection. While it enhances real-time communication capabilities, it also introduces several security concerns.

sections.content: WebSocket Vulnerabilities: WebSocket is a communication protocol that enables full-duplex communication between a client and a server over a single, long-lived connection. While it enhances real-time communication capabilities, it also introduces several security concerns.
